headline_seed: Anna Kepner was allegedly sexually assaulted by her 16-year-old brother before he killed her: indictment
draft_text:
A federal grand jury has indicted a 16-year-old on first-degree murder and aggravated sexual assault charges in the November 2025 death of Anna Kepner aboard a Carnival cruise ship. Tampa Bay Times reports the suspect faces life in prison.

And that's the mews.
